text: On 14 March 2024, a SWIFT payment of EUR 2,500,000 was transferred from account DE89370400440532013000 to account FR7630006000011234567890189 with reference TXN-2024-EUR-0042.
The bond purchase transaction (ref: BND-2024-US-1178) settled on T+2 for a face value of USD 10,000,000 at a price of 98.75, yielding an effective cost of USD 9,875,000.
Three suspicious transactions were flagged: a cash deposit of USD 9,800 on 2 January 2024, followed by an immediate wire transfer of USD 9,750 to a foreign account on 3 January 2024.

text: The FX spot transaction executed on 20 February 2024 converted GBP 5,000,000 to EUR 5,850,000 at an exchange rate of 1.1700, settling two business days later.

text: Drawdown No. 3 under the revolving credit facility, in the amount of EUR 15,000,000, was made on 30 April 2024 with a maturity date of 31 July 2024.
